textByHash.09fa697386c89053ee80264e09402d80fa508307: The Great Guardian wants you to know that there has been a development in our fight against the Abyss.
textByHash.baacd0e79362135055fab8b48d8a89f5bad5a993: A magical signal has been detected emerging from the rift. It is not of the Abyss.
textByHash.8368f89d8ca4b2886d3c1b980dc8580fa2f5b1dd: Nothing can survive the Scar. To enter would not be wise.
textByHash.e8c65dfdc7d896371a8328e657ba379de79c3f8a: There are a few who have entered the Scar in the past. None have returned.
textByHash.caad1288bae6c6a45ee1a15a46d9556f481ac32e: If you wish to enter, it is not our place to stop you. In the likely event of your demise, you will be mourned.
textByHash.d91f3f17e5d8c397b7f51cb4f3af862418ea838a: The rift is unpredictable. Normally, you would not be able to control its destination. However, the magical signal coming from within could be of benefit. It could act as a guide.
textByHash.b1af1aad4ab6ec9f73d89f3fad3c7de8e74b216d: Are you ready to enter the Scar?
textByHash.10ab0681de1abcf6308347e45257009caa535dd5: Then may your death come quick, human. Good luck.
textByHash.a6da6b8bfc576e03617acd8c34eb7f0cdbb36216: Then speak to me once you are.
textByHash.bb41c39a17466c5abfa1f751b8fc554ceb807ab3: How unexpected. The Great Guardian will need to be informed.
textByHash.e86a1469c9195b8cd74b3a3133021954c331674d: In the meantime, do you wish to return to the Scar?
textByHash.1bc089d1a7805e760bee63108ddd36c65b338ec4: Speak to me again if you do.
textByHash.eb20073cd618f65a6d3c5afd00cd35e6f63d723f: Do you wish to return to the Scar?
